TMW Intelligence

Ask anything about this market.

Try: what's breaking ground in 2026? tallest tower in pipeline most active firm

The United States pipeline

We track 476 new developments across United States — 177 under construction, 23 breaking ground, 50 opening soon, and 163 announced. Most active markets: Miami (88), West Palm Beach (60), Nashville (27), New York City (27), Miami Beach (18). Specializing in: Residences (263), Hotel (55), Mixed-Use (53).

How we built this list

Every project on this page is on the Map of Tomorrow — our live database of new and under-construction developments worldwide. Project status, milestones, and spec changes are sourced from public filings, official announcements, or independent reporting and timestamped. Pro members get our weekly Slippage Report, the TMW Forecast on every project, and the full United States dataset by phase, neighborhood, and developer.

Common questions

Frequently asked

What new developments are coming to United States?
We track 476 active developments across United States — 177 under construction, 23 breaking ground, 50 opening soon, and 163 announced. Every city with at least 3 projects has a dedicated landing page (see below).
How many projects are under construction in United States?
177 projects are currently under construction across United States, ranging from luxury condos to mixed-use districts. Click any city below for the full local pipeline.
What projects are opening soon in United States?
50 projects are flagged Opening Soon across United States — expected to open within ~7 months.
Which United States cities have the most new developments?
The deepest pipelines are in Miami (88), West Palm Beach (60), Nashville (27). United States has 94 cities with active projects in our database.
Who is the biggest developer building in United States?
Related Ross leads United States with 14 active projects across cities.
Which architects are designing the most new projects in United States?
Arquitectonica is the architect of record on 60 United States projects — the most of any firm in the state.
What is the tallest tower being built in United States?
Tribune Tower Addition in Chicago at 113 floors. See the project →
How many new residential units are being added across United States?
Across the active United States pipeline, the developments we track will add 106,403 residential units across 476 projects.
When will the next wave of United States projects deliver?
Delivery dates across the active United States pipeline run from 2017 through 2034. Individual delivery dates shift constantly — Pro members get our weekly Slippage Report.
How often is the United States development data updated?
Hourly. Our cron pipeline pulls fresh data from the source-of-truth database every hour and regenerates this page (and every market and firm page).
